item.title: F-027: AI — Translation (Pro AI)
item.intent: Translation is a killer Pro AI feature — select text, pick a language, get an inline preview. Must work across 20+ languages.
item.description: Select text, translate to another language. Cloud-powered for quality across 20+ languages: EN, ES, FR, DE, ZH, JA, KO, PT, IT, RU, AR, HI, NL, SV, PL, DA, NO, FI, TR, TH. Translation appears as inline replacement preview. Original recoverable via undo. Only selected text sent per D-AI-8.
acceptanceCriteria: Pro subscriber selects English paragraph, taps Translate to Spanish, translated text appears as preview within 3 seconds
Only selected text is sent to cloud API
Cloud API failure mid-translation shows partial result with option to retry or cancel
Very long selection (5000+ words) shows warning about processing time
